name: Aude (France)
description: A red field with an embattled (crenellated) edge, charged in the centre with a yellow Occitan cross (a cross clechée, voided and pommetty of twelve).
history: The Occitan cross derives from the arms of the Counts of Toulouse and symbolises the region's Occitan identity.

features.role: yellow Occitan cross, clechée voided and pommetty
